2605.18073.title: A-ProS: Towards Reliable Autonomous Programming Through Multi-Model Feedback
2605.18073.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong potential for automated code generation, yet their ability to iteratively refine solutions using execution feedback remains underexplored. Competitive programming offers an ideal testbed for this investigation, as it demands end-to-end algorithmic reasoning, precise implementation under strict computational constraints, and complete functional correctness with rigorous evaluation. In this paper, we present A-ProS, an autonomous AI agent that solves competitive programming problems through a hybrid multi-model feedback framework separating solution generation from specialized debugging. A-ProS combines ChatGPT-based generators (GPT-4 and GPT-5) with three debugging critics: Codestral-2508, Llama-3.3-70B, and DeepSeek-R1, under a 2 x 3 factorial design. We evaluate six workflows on 367 problems from ICPC World Finals (2011-2024) and Codeforces (rated 1200-1800). The results show that GPT-5 workflows improve from 39 initial accepted solutions to 85-90 after three refinement rounds, while GPT-4 improves from 15 to 31-38. A controlled ablation on 47 problems shows that stateful refinement outperforms stateless approaches by 8.5-10.6 percentage points and reduces repeated failures by up to 3.5x. Compared to baseline agent loops, A-ProS achieves over 2x greater gains, highlighting the importance of persistent context and multi-model feedback for reliable autonomous program synthesis.
2605.18073.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）顯示出自動化代碼生成的強大潛力，但它們利用執行反饋迭代改進解決方案的能力仍然未被充分探索。競賽編程為這項研究提供了理想的測試平台，因為它要求端到端的算法推理、在嚴格計算限制下的精確實現，以及經過嚴格評估的完整功能正確性。在本文中，我們介紹了 A-ProS，一個通過混合多模型反饋框架解決競賽編程問題的自主 AI 代理，該框架將解決方案生成與專門的調試分開。A-ProS 將基於 ChatGPT 的生成器（GPT-4 和 GPT-5）與三個調試評估器結合：Codestral-2508、Llama-3.3-70B 和 DeepSeek-R1，採用 2 x 3 的因子設計。我們在來自 ICPC 世界總決賽（2011-2024）和 Codeforces（評分 1200-1800）的 367 個問題上評估了六種工作流程。結果顯示，GPT-5 的工作流程從 39 個初始接受的解決方案提高到 85-90 個，經過三輪改進，而 GPT-4 則從 15 個提高到 31-38 個。對 47 個問題進行的受控消融實驗顯示，有狀態的改進比無狀態的方法高出 8.5-10.6 個百分點，並將重複失敗減少了最多 3.5 倍。與基線代理循環相比，A-ProS 的增益超過 2 倍，突顯了持久上下文和多模型反饋對於可靠的自主程序合成的重要性。
2605.18073.author: Anika Tabassum et.al.
2605.18073.authors: Anika Tabassum, Md Sifat Hossain, Md. Fahim Arefin, Tariqul Islam, Tarannum Shaila Zaman
